svg.title: PixelRonin.Dev full stack architecture
svg.desc: Shows the three layers: browser, Cloudflare edge, and Supabase database, with arrows showing data flow

g.text: This is what your user actually sees and clicks
Layer 2 — Cloudflare edge (your servers, in the cloud)
Cloudflare runs your code in 300+ cities worldwide. Users get low latency wherever they are.
Your Hono API calls this. Days 26–29.
Layer 3 — Supabase (your database, hosted for you)
Supabase gives you a real PostgreSQL database in the cloud. You talk to it from your Hono API.
